name: Atlantic Jewelry & Loan
description_short: Family-owned pawn shop since 1998 specializing in jewelry, gold, Rolex watches, and collateral-based loans. Buys gift cards, coins, and high-end merchandise.
description_long:
Atlantic Jewelry & Loan is a family-owned and operated pawn shop established in 1998, operating under the brand weloanmore.com. The company is based in Jacksonville, Florida (904 area code) and has built its reputation over more than two decades in the collateral lending and precious metals buying business.

The company offers a range of pawn and buying services centered on jewelry, timepieces, and precious metals. Core services include pawn loans on items of value, purchase of gold at market-competitive rates (advertised at 90% of market price), silver buying, Rolex timepiece purchases (marketed as paying "top dollar"), gold coin buying, and gift card purchases (up to 75% cash value). They also operate retail inventory through their main store (with new items listed daily) and two eBay storefronts for resale merchandise.

Atlantic distinguishes itself through specialization in high-end merchandise, particularly Rolex watches, and transparent pricing communication (publishing gold and silver payout rates). The "high standards of excellence" and family ownership messaging suggests a focus on customer service and relationship-building within the pawn industry. Their dual revenue model—lending against collateral and buying outright for resale—is standard for the category.

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers needing fast liquidity against personal assets, though pawn loans typically carry high implicit interest rates when annualized. The company provides no transparency on loan terms, APR, repayment periods, or default consequences on their website. Gift card and precious metals buying is straightforward but represents lower-margin services compared to lending.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Family-owned business operating 25+ years, suggesting stability and local reputation
Advertises competitive precious metals pricing (90% of market for gold, specific payout rates published)
Specializes in high-end items like Rolex watches with dedicated premium pricing
Multiple sales channels (retail store, two eBay storefronts) indicate healthy inventory and resale operations
Offers gift card buying service at reasonable rates (up to 75% cash), a convenience service not all pawn shops provide
Clear contact method (phone number and web form) for high-end merchandise inquiries
Local Jacksonville presence with established phone line, not online-only operation
cons: Website provides zero transparency on loan terms, repayment periods, or interest rates—standard pawn shop opacity
No information on maximum loan amounts, eligibility requirements, or how loan-to-value is calculated
Pawn loans carry high implicit annualized interest rates typical of the category, not disclosed here
Limited detail on what constitutes acceptable collateral beyond vague "anything of value" language
No mention of default or redemption policies, grace periods, or what happens to unredeemed items
best_for: People needing immediate cash who own jewelry, watches, gold, or other valuables and prefer collateral loans to unsecured debt
Sellers of precious metals or Rolex watches seeking cash-for-goods transactions without shipping hassles
Gift card holders looking to convert unwanted cards to cash quickly, even at a discount
High-net-worth individuals in Jacksonville with luxury timepieces seeking expert appraisal and fair buyout offers
diagnosis: Atlantic Jewelry & Loan is best for Jacksonville-area residents and luxury watch/jewelry owners needing immediate cash against collateral, or those selling precious metals and gift cards. The primary caveat is that pawn lending inherently involves high effective interest rates when annualized, and the website lacks critical disclosure of loan terms—requiring customers to visit the store or call to understand actual borrowing costs before committing assets.
services: Pawn loans on items of value
Gold buying at advertised market percentage (90%)
Gift card purchasing (up to 75% cash value)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
